title: Senior Doctor - Aurobindo Pharma - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Aurobindo Pharma - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!
